strength.name: Strength
strength.summary: Strength measures bodily power, athletic training, and raw physical force.

dexterity.name: Dexterity
dexterity.summary: Dexterity measures agility, reflexes, and balance.

constitution.name: Constitution
constitution.summary: Constitution measures health, stamina, and vital force.

intelligence.name: Intelligence
intelligence.summary: Intelligence measures mental acuity, accuracy of recall, and reasoning.

wisdom.name: Wisdom
wisdom.summary: Wisdom reflects perceptiveness, intuition, and attunement to the world.

charisma.name: Charisma
charisma.summary: Charisma measures force of personality and effectiveness in social interaction.
